response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer and Staff Engineer, particularly in TypeScript and fullstack roles, aligns well with the job requirements. His background in building scalable platforms, optimizing systems, and working with modern web technologies (React, Node.js, Nest.js) demonstrates strong technical fit. However, his lack of direct PostgreSQL experience and limited exposure to the renewable energy/construction tech domain slightly reduces his immediate suitability.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple roles
Proven ability to build and optimize scalable platforms and APIs
Experience with React, Node.js, and modern web architectures
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primary required database)
No visible work in renewable energy or construction technology sectors
High seniority level may overshadow the entry-level position expectations
